name: Git
description: Git log viewer with push, pull, and rebase support
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Keep command output across reloads, search Git history more effectively, and group Windows paths consistently.
1.0.1: Redesigned Changes pane with inline diff peek, per-workspace tab memory, detached-HEAD handling, and Output log fixes.
marketplace.tagline: Visual git log with push, pull, and branch management
marketplace.longDescription: Browse your commit history in a visual log panel, inspect diffs, push and pull changes, and manage branches. Integrates into the bottom panel with a keyboard shortcut for quick access.
highlights: Visual commit history with diff inspection
Push, pull, and rebase from the panel

screenshots.alt: Git log panel showing commit history with diffs and branch management

panels.title: Git Log
panels.tooltip: Browse commit history, inspect diffs, push/pull, and manage branches.
